title: persona-3-reload
shortDescription: Dive into the Dark Hour and awaken the depths of your heart. Persona 3 Reload is a captivating reimagining of the genre-defining RPG, reborn for the modern era with cutting-edge graphics and gameplay.
detailedDescriptionHtml:
Step into the shoes of a transfer student thrust into an unexpected fate when entering the hour "hidden" between one day and the next. Awaken an incredible power and chase the mysteries of the Dark Hour, fight for your friends, and leave a mark on their memories forever.

Persona 3 Reload is a captivating reimagining of the genre-defining RPG, reborn for the modern era.

Key Features:

- Experience the pivotal game of the Persona series faithfully remade with cutting-edge graphics, modernized quality-of-life features, and signature stylish UI.

-Fully immerse yourself in an emotional, gripping journey with new scenes, character interactions, and additional voiceover.

- Choose how to meaningfully spend each day through various activities, from exploring the Port Island to forging genuine bonds with beloved characters.

- Build and command your optimal team to take down otherworldly Shadows and climb closer to the truth.

---

Persona 3 Reload Digital Deluxe Edition includes:

  • Base Game

  • Digital Artbook: Filled with 64 pages of character art, concept art, backgrounds and other illustrations from the game!

  • Digital Soundtrack: Listen to newly arranged tracks from the original Persona 3 plus all-new tracks from Persona 3 Reload, presented by the Atlus sound team for a total of 60 new songs.

---

Persona 3 Reload Digital Premium Edition includes:

  • Base Game

  • Digital Artbook

  • Digital Soundtrack

  • Persona 3 Reload DLC Pack: P5R Phantom Thieves Costume Set, P5R Shujin Academy Costume Set, P5R Persona Set 1, P5R Persona Set 2 , P5R BGM Set, P4G Yasogami High Costume Set, P4G Persona Set

supportedLanguagesHtml:
English*, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Japanese*, Korean, Polish, Portuguese - Brazil, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Turkish
*languages with full audio support

pcRequirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 10
  • Processor: Intel Core i5-2300, AMD FX-4350
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 650 Ti, 2 GB; AMD Radeon HD 7850, 2 GB
  • DirectX: Version 12
  • Storage: 30 GB available space
  • Additional Notes: Performance Target: 720p, low graphics settings, @ 30 FPS. Microsoft no longer supports Windows 10 or older versions.
pcRequirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 10
  • Processor: Intel Core i7-4790, AMD Ryzen 5 1400
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1650, 4 GB, AMD Radeon R9 290X, 4 GB
  • DirectX: Version 12
  • Storage: 30 GB available space
  • Additional Notes: Performance Target: 1080p, high graphics settings, @ 60 FPS. Microsoft no longer supports Windows 10 or older versions.

newsItems.title: Persona 6 Wishlist is Now Open!
newsItems.author: ATLUS West
newsItems.contents: [p]Wish listing for Persona 6 is officially open![/p][p][/p][p]While staying true to the distinctive atmosphere and innovative gameplay experience that have made the series beloved for years, Persona 6 introduces an entirely new setting and story.[/p][p]Each mainline title features a self-contained narrative with no story ties to previous games — so if this is your first Persona experience, jump right in![/p][p][/p][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/44538637/b917af79a607e7a2c20d9208d0ddb41a1fee3324.jpg"][/img][/p][p][/p][p]Check out the Teaser Trailer![/p][p][/p][p][dynamiclink href="https://youtu.be/CL-q0HgfMOY?si=E8H0XGLk608c-uwn"][/dynamiclink][/p][p][u]About the Persona Series[/u][/p][p]■A Legacy of Over 30 Years[/p][p]The Persona series is one of Atlus's flagship RPG franchises. Born as a spin-off of the Shin Megami Tensei series, it began with the release of Revelations: Persona in 1996 and has continued to captivate players for over 30 years.[/p][p] [/p][p]■Harness the Power of Persona and the Bonds You Share[/p][p]Those who awaken to their "Persona" - a manifestation of their inner self - come together, forge deep bonds, and grow through countless trials and hardships.[/p][p] [/p][p]■Live a Year Alongside Unforgettable Companions in Modern-Day Japan[/p][p]Set against the backdrop of contemporary Japanese cities, the series follows young men and women navigating the everyday experiences of school life, friendship, and romance — while confronting occult mysteries rooted in strange rumors and urban legends.[/p][p] [/p][p]Wishlist Now![/p][p]©ATLUS. ©SEGA.[/p]

newsItems.title: Persona 4 Revival launches February 18, 2027 – Pre-order Available Now!
newsItems.author: ATLUS West
newsItems.contents: [p]Hello Investigation Teams, [/p][p]We’re thrilled to announce that [b]pre-orders for [i]Persona 4 Revival[/i][/b] are officially live! Whether you’re returning to reach out to the truth once more or stepping into this unforgettable journey for the first time, now is your chance to experience a beloved classic reborn. [/p][p] [/p][p align="center"][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/45703712/72e600eda74bf7ce4190d5f175eb53602efa5c54.jpg"][/img] [/p][p][b]Watch the new Pre-order Trailer![/b] [/p][p][/p][p align="center"][dynamiclink href="https://youtu.be/1osdiOAkBKc"][/dynamiclink]  [/p][p][b]Who’s on Air?[/b]  Legend has it that a mysterious broadcast known as the “Midnight Channel” appears only on rainy nights. The day after it airs, a corpse is found in Inaba, a quiet and peaceful town in rural Japan suddenly thrown into turmoil. [/p][p]To uncover the truth behind these chilling mysteries, you and your friends form an investigation team to unravel the secrets of the Midnight Channel and the bizarre murders. As your adventure unfolds, you face off against “Shadows,” eerie manifestations of individuals’ darker selves. Together, you awaken a hidden power called “Persona” and embark on a journey to prevent more tragedies while uncovering the truth behind the chaos. [/p][p] [/p][p][b]Key Features[/b] [/p][p][b]■ Discover the Thrilling Midnight Channel[/b]  Immerse yourself in a dual-layered narrative set in the peaceful yet unsettling town of Inaba. Investigate supernatural occurrences, solve murders, and unravel the secrets of the Midnight Channel alongside your teammates in a story-driven gameplay experience. [/p][p][b]■ Exhilarating Turn-Based Battles[/b]  Exploit enemy weaknesses, unleash powerful “All-Out Attacks,” and master the strategic use of Personas to overcome formidable foes. Acquire or fuse new Personas and develop your unique battle style as you uncover the secrets behind the Midnight Channel. [/p][p][b]■ Shape Your Year and Your Destiny[/b]  Immerse yourself in the life of a teenager, where every day is filled with new choices. Balance sports, part-time jobs, school life, and friendships, all while preparing to confront the mysteries of the Midnight Channel. Every decision you make shapes your journey, leading to unique and unforgettable experiences and endings. [/p][p][b]■ Anime Cutscenes & Memorable Characters[/b]  Experience beautifully updated anime-style and 3D cutscenes and strengthen bonds with irreplaceable characters. Every heartfelt connection impacts your journey and shapes the story. [/p][p][b]■ A Beloved Remake for Fans and Newcomers[/b]  Rediscover the iconic Persona adventure with enhanced visuals, improved gameplay, modern aesthetics, and exciting new quality-of-life updates that bring the classic to life like never before. [img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/45703712/38ca219048e780e37af31d1348c441dd5fce26a6.png"][/img][/p][p] [/p][p][b]Pre-Order Bonus[/b] [/p][p]Pre-order now and receive exclusive bonuses that will elevate your Persona 4 Revival experience! [/p][p][b]Persona 4 Revival: P3R & P5R Extra BGM Set[/b] [/p][p][b]P3R Extra BGMs include:[/b] [/p][list][*][p]Dungeon BGM: Basement (P3R ver.) [/p][/*][/list][list][*][p]Boss Battle BGM: Heartful Cry [/p][/*][/list][list][*][p]Result BGM: After the Battle (P3R ver.) [/p][/*][/list][p][b]P5R Extra  BGMs include:[/b] [/p][list][*][p]Dungeon BGM: The Whims of Fate [/p][/*][/list][list][*][p]Normal Battle BGM: Will Power [/p][/*][/list][list][*][p]Result BGM: Triumph [/p][/*][/list][p][i]This add-on is available to those who pre-order by February 17, 2027 @ 23:59.[/i]  [i]A separately sold base game is required to access the bonus content. Please ensure the game is updated to the latest patch if applicable.[/i]  [i]Note: Some overlapping content may occur.[/i] [/p][p] [/p][p]Return to the quiet town of Inaba—where peaceful days hide something far more unsettling beneath the surface. [/p][p]Whether you’re returning to Inaba or stepping into this story for the first time, we’re excited to have you join the investigation. [/p][p] [/p][p][b]Pre-order now![/b] [/p][p]©ATLUS. ©SEGA.[/p][p][/p][p][dynamiclink href="https://store.steampowered.com/app/2963950/Persona_4_Revival/"][/dynamiclink][/p]

newsItems.title: Persona5: The Phantom X Makoto Yuki from Persona 3 Reload Makes His Debut!
newsItems.author: ATLUS West
newsItems.contents: [p]SEGA has released the Ver. 4.1 update for Persona5: The Phantom X (P5X). This update introduces the Persona 3 Reload (P3R) special event Met by Moonlight Part 1 and Makoto Yuki, a new 5★ character from P3R.[/p][p][/p][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/44538637/abd4a229a7cb162b502beb848e45a1ae518ff044.png"][/img][/p][p][b][u]◆ Persona 3 Reload Special Event - Met by Moonlight Part 1[/u][/b][/p][p]A hidden hour exists between one day and the next. The Dark Hour.​[/p][p]The massive tower Tartarus appears during this Dark Hour, infested with Shadows.​[/p][p]In this story, the Phantom Thieves from P5X wander into a place resembling Tartarus and fight alongside the members of S.E.E.S. from Persona 3 Reload. ​[/p][p] [/p][p]Other familiar locations from Persona 3 Reload, such as Paulownia Mall, also appear.​[/p][p]As the two titles intersect, players will not only see new sides of the P5X characters, but also get a closer look into the thoughts and feelings of the Persona 3 Reload characters.​[/p][p]It's a must-see for Persona fans.​[/p][p][/p][p][b]Summary of the Story[/b][/p][p]One day after school, Wonder heads out with Riko and Lufel to an artificial island known as Port Island.​ However, on their way back, strange things begin happening around them. He becomes separated from Riko and the others and ends up wandering into a labyrinth.​[/p][p] [/p][p]Inside the labyrinth, the protagonist is cornered and attacked by Shadows until he's saved by a boy who introduces himself as Makoto Yuki.​ Afterward, they reunite with one of Makoto's companions, Yukari Takeba. Unfortunately, it seems she was separated from the rest of the group.​[/p][p] [/p][p]As Wonder and Makoto search for their missing friends, they decide to advance together through the labyrinth known as Tartarus. They discover a mysterious door on their journey. An impossible scene awaits on the other side...​[/p][p][/p][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/44538637/86171b17719e383ddce2e6b6c3806dd6a8f0639d.png"][/img][/p][p][b][u]◆ 5★ Makoto Yuki arrives in P5X![/u][/b][/p][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/44538637/67e02ffe2432f28e533ec49b57053b484143d323.png"][/img][/p][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/44538637/31806d60ef9fc3a7474682ac18c432aa04bc5580.png"][/img][/p][p]Makoto Yuki from Persona 3 Reload makes his P5X debut as a 5★ character in Most Wanted Phantom Idol Contracts, which features increased rates for certain characters. His exclusive 5★ weapon is also available from the Arms Deals: Silent Pistol.[/p][p] [/p][p][b]Most Wanted Phantom Thief Contract: When Moon Reaches Stars[/b][/p][p][b]Duration: Ends June 25th, 2026, 1:59 AM (UTC)[/b][/p][p][b] [/b][/p][p][b]▼ Most Wanted 5★: Makoto Yuki[/b][/p][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/44538637/d320cb305b542971d2641fafa0bf6066e0763691.png"][/img][/p][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/44538637/c11e13b767fd02aa08dfc7c87213554e4ed1e168.png"][/img][/p][p]Makoto Yuki is a top class 5★ Fire-attribute Assassin specializing in offense.[/p][p]By gaining Moon Phase stacks through his own skills and ally support, he can unleash devastating damage. In addition to his offensive power, he also excels at buffing the entire party.[/p][p] [/p][p]As a P3R character, he also uses Assist actions and Theurgy in place of ranged attacks and Highlight respectively.[/p][p] [/p][p][b][u]◆ Special Outfit for Makoto Yuki[/u][/b][/p][p]Players can purchase the Butler Makoto Yuki set from the Shop at a discounted price of 2,880 Meta Jewels. The set also includes the Butler Makoto Avatar, the Tea Time profile design, and the Blue Moon Glory profile frame.[/p][p] [/p][p]After June 25th, 2026, 1:59 AM (UTC), the set will be available for 3,200 Meta Jewels.[/p][p] [/p][p][b][u]◆ 1st Anniversary Countdown Campaign Information[/u][/b][/p][p][b]Login Bonus[/b][/p][p]A special countdown campaign leading up to the 1st Anniversary in June is now underway.[/p][p]Log in for 7 days during the event period to receive 5 Platinum Tickets and 5 Platinum Milicoins, which can be used for Contracts and Arms Deals respectively.[/p][p][b]Duration: Until June 4th, 2026, 1:59 AM (UTC)[/b][/p][p][/p][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/44538637/c3939c0ed9d572bd6eec1bb7c2f916d30a47d544.png"][/img][/p][p][b]Anniversary Special Daily Hoot-n-Loot[/b][/p][p]The Daily Hoot-n-Loot is coming with boosted rewards during the 1st Anniversary celebration period. Players can receive a total of 1,600 Meta Jewels and 2,400 Wingbeat Coins by logging in for 28 days during the period.[/p][p] [/p][p][b]Duration: June 1st, 2026, 5:00 AM – August 1st, 2026, 4:59 AM (server time)[/b][/p][p][/p][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/44538637/e697e79735708999c08cf12334a76944e2f14c7b.png"][/img][/p][p]In addition, a total of 600 Meta Jewels will be sent to players, including 300 Meta Jewels to commemorate the update and another 300 Meta Jewels as a token of appreciation for watching the official broadcast covering the Ver. 4.1 update.[/p][p][b] [/b][/p][p][b]Update Celebration Gift & Official Broadcast Gift: Available until June 4th, 2026, 1:59 AM (UTC)[/b][/p][p][/p][p][b][u]◆ Persona5: The Phantom X[/u][/b][/p][p][/p][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/44538637/f38facbcede6f9896dc4a95dffcdff546cb66da4.png"][/img][/p][p][/p][p]Jump into the thrilling double life of a seemingly ordinary high school student in Tokyo. Make the most of student life in Japan by hitting the bustling cities of Shibuya, Shinjuku, and Kichijoji. Once the bell rings, don the mask of a Phantom Thief and infiltrate the hidden realm of the Metaverse to take on the dark beings that lie within...[/p][p]How you spend your high-school days is completely up to you. Join after-school clubs, make a quick buck at a range of part-time jobs, hang with friends...and even go out on dates![/p][p]As you watch movies together, share meals, and lend an ear to their troubles, those strangers might just become a best friend, or even a soulmate...[/p][p]Strengthen these bonds to unlock powerful abilities that will aid you in the Metaverse. Your interactions will be the key to moving the story forward.[/p][p]At night, step into another world where twisted enemies known as Shadows lurk. Awaken the inner power of your Personas and skillfully use them to take down foes in stylish battles played along to a beloved soundtrack! Your secret double life awaits...[/p][p] [/p][p][b]▼Click here to download P5X![/b][/p][p] [dynamiclink href="https://store.steampowered.com/app/3061570"][/dynamiclink][/p][p][/p]

newsItems.title: ATLUS Game-Themed Avatar Frames Now Available In Persona 5: The Phantom X!
newsItems.author: ATLUS West
newsItems.contents: [p]Blooming deals await at the SEGA Steam Spring Sale![/p][p]Sale Period: 19 March, 2026, 5:00 PM - 26 March, 2026, 4:59 PM. (UTC)[/p][p][/p][p]Don't miss this chance to save 50% on Metaphor: ReFantazio, up to 60% on Persona 3 Reload, or 70% on Persona 5 Royal![/p][p]Celebrate the sale with exclusive limited-time avatar frames featuring Metaphor: ReFantazio, Persona 3 Reload, and Persona 5 Royal – now available for download in Persona 5: The Phantom X![/p][p]Head to Persona 5: The Phantom X for the SEGA Steam Spring Sale Exclusive ATLUS Game-Themed Avatar Frames Giveaway*[/p][p][/p][p]◆SEGA Steam Spring Sale Exclusive ATLUS Game-Themed Avatar Frames Giveaway*[/p][p]Claim by: 2 April, 2026 1:59AM (UTC)[/p][p]Contents:[/p][p]Limited-Time Metaphor: ReFantazio Avatar Frame - Hero's Awakening[/p][p]Limited-Time Persona 3 Reload Avatar Frame - Evoked Awakening[/p][p]Limited-Time Persona 5 Royal Avatar Frame - Mask of Faith[/p][p][i]*no purchase required to claim gifts[/i][/p][p][/p][p][b][u]◆ Persona5: The Phantom X[/u][/b] [/p][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/44538637/f38facbcede6f9896dc4a95dffcdff546cb66da4.png"][/img][/p][p]Jump into the thrilling double life of a seemingly ordinary high school student in Tokyo. Make the most of student life in Japan by hitting the bustling cities of Shibuya, Shinjuku, and Kichijoji. Once the bell rings, don the mask of a Phantom Thief and infiltrate the hidden realm of the Metaverse to take on the dark beings that lie within... [/p]
